summary: Comprehensive testing of major roles/permissions redesign (iteration 164). Fixed 2 TypeScript compilation errors in UsersTab.tsx (wrong prop names for AdminPageHeader and AdminPagination). All 28 backend tests pass. All 11 frontend features verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: Old custom roles created before this redesign (e.g. 'TEST UI Role Iter136') do not have module_permissions field - only preset roles were migrated. Not blocking but legacy data migration gap.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: AdminPageHeader used 'description' prop (not valid) - corrected to 'subtitle'. AdminPagination used 'onPageChange' prop (not valid) - corrected to 'onPage' with required 'total' and 'perPage' props. These caused TypeScript compilation errors blocking the page from loading.
ui_bugs.priority: CRITICAL - already fixed by testing agent

design_issues.screen: Edit User Dialog (for Partner Super Admin users)
issues: Edit dialog shows all module permissions as 'No Access' for partner_super_admin users even though they have full access via their role. Could be confusing to admin - might want to indicate 'Full access via role' instead of showing empty module_permissions.

action_items: Consider migrating old custom roles to add module_permissions field (data migration) to ensure all roles in GET /api/admin/roles have module_permissions
UX: Edit dialog for super admin users shows all modules as 'No Access' - consider showing 'Full access via super admin role' or pre-populating with write permissions
critical_code_review_comments: UsersTab.tsx had wrong props passed to AdminPageHeader ('description' should be 'subtitle') and AdminPagination ('onPageChange' should be 'onPage', missing 'total' and 'perPage') - these were TypeScript compilation errors that prevented the Users tab from rendering. Fixed.

Old custom roles in DB (from pre-redesign) lack module_permissions field - the roles API returns these legacy roles without the new format. May need a DB migration or backward compatibility handling in roles serialization.
seed_data_creation: Backend test creates 'test-platform-admin-iter164@test.local' platform_admin user (persists in DB for regression testing). Tags 'enterprise-customer' added/removed during testing (cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_164 - All features of major roles/permissions redesign verified: (1) Tags sub-tab as 4th tab in Partner Orgs - working with add/remove, (2) Platform Admin user creation from Users tab - working with per-module permissions, (3) Platform super admin 'Protected' row in Users table - verified, (4) Per-module read/write permissions in Create AND Edit dialog (19 module selectors) - verified, (5) Make Super Admin button in expanded partner org user list - verified in Test Partner Co. TypeScript compilation errors in UsersTab.tsx were fixed (wrong prop names). Test user test-platform-admin-iter164@test.local exists in DB.

test_features_verified.tags_sub_tab: ✓ 4th sub-tab in Partner Orgs with data-testid='tenants-sub-tab-tags'
test_features_verified.tags_add_remove: ✓ Add/remove tags working with success toast
test_features_verified.platform_admin_role_creation: ✓ Role dropdown shows Platform Admin, Partner Admin, Partner Staff (no Platform Super Admin)
test_features_verified.per_module_permissions_create: ✓ 19 module selectors in Create User dialog
test_features_verified.per_module_permissions_edit: ✓ 19 module selectors in Edit User dialog (not global access_level)
test_features_verified.platform_super_admin_protected: ✓ Protected row with lock icon and italic 'Protected' text
test_features_verified.make_super_admin_button: ✓ transfer-super-admin-{id} button visible for non-super-admin users in partner org
test_features_verified.platform_admin_badge: ✓ Platform Admin role available and correctly created
test_features_verified.module_permissions_api: ✓ GET /api/admin/permissions/modules returns modules, preset_roles, platform_module_keys, partner_module_keys
